ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Name of the team's home ground */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the umpire belongs to */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience as an umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_umpires" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the umpire */,
  "umpire_role" TEXT /* Role of the umpire in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the player */,
  "balls_bowled" INTEGER /* Balls bowled by the player */,
  "overs_bowled" TEXT /* Overs bowled by the player */,
  "maiden_overs" INTEGER /* Maiden overs bowled by the player */,
  "runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Runs conceded by the player */,
  "catches" INTEGER /* Catches taken by the player */,
  "stumpings" INTEGER /* Stumpings made by the player */,
  "dismissals" INTEGER /* Total dismissals made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tosses" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "toss_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner */,
  "toss_called_by" TEXT /* Captain who called the toss */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tosses_toss_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("toss_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "result_margin" INTEGER /* Margin of victory */,
  "eliminator" TEXT /* Whether the match was an eliminator */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of victory */,
  "match_winner_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the match result (e.g., D/L method, Super Over) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_venues" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "neutral_venue" INTEGER /* Whether the venue was neutral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_venues_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., round-robin, knockout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "team1_overs" TEXT /* Overs played by the first team */,
  "team2_overs" TEXT /* Overs played by the second team */,
  "team1_wickets" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the first team */,
  "team2_wickets" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the second team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken */,
  "balls_bowled" INTEGER /* Total balls bowled */,
  "catches" INTEGER /* Total catches taken */,
  "stumpings" INTEGER /* Total stumpings made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "matches_won" INTEGER /* Number of matches won */,
  "matches_lost" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
